2606.15911.title: Interactor: Agentic RL oriented Iterative Creation for Ad Description Generation in Sponsored Search
2606.15911.paper_summary: This paper focuses on automatically generating informative ad descriptions in sponsored search. Unlike ad titles which are usually optimized to attract user click feedbacks, ad descriptions have a longer text span and possess the potential of incorporating world knowledge to address user search intents while presenting the fine-grained selling points of the ads. We propose Interactor, a multi-turn iterative creation framework optimized with agentic RL for ad description generation. The generation model acts as a policy that interacts with a customized environment consisting of multiple generative reward models. Given initial generations by the policy, the customized GenRMs evaluate multi-dimensional qualities including knowledge capacity and landing page consistency, providing both binary signals and reasoning feedbacks. The policy then iteratively refines the descriptions based on such feedbacks to ensure continuous improvement. Experiments on industrial datasets show that the Interactor framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in generating knowledge-rich and faithful ad descriptions. Since May 2026, it has been deployed online in a leading search ads system, contributing to both ad revenue and user experience.
2606.15911.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文專注於自動生成贊助搜尋中的資訊性廣告描述。<lb/>與通常優化以吸引用戶點擊反饋的廣告標題不同，廣告描述具有較長的文本範圍，並具備結合世界知識以滿足用戶搜尋意圖的潛力，同時呈現廣告的細緻銷售點。<lb/>我們提出了Interactor，一個基於代理強化學習優化的多回合迭代創建框架，用於廣告描述生成。<lb/>生成模型作為一個策略，與由多個生成獎勵模型組成的定制環境進行互動。<lb/>在策略給出的初始生成結果下，定制的GenRMs評估包括知識容量和著陸頁一致性在內的多維品質，提供二元信號和推理反饋。<lb/>然後，策略根據這些反饋迭代地完善描述，以確保持續改進。<lb/>在工業數據集上的實驗顯示，Interactor框架在生成知識豐富且真實的廣告描述方面顯著超越了最先進的方法。<lb/>自2026年5月以來，它已在一個領先的搜尋廣告系統中上線，為廣告收入和用戶體驗做出了貢獻。
2606.15911.author: Penghui Wei et.al.
2606.15911.authors: Penghui Wei, Jiayu Wu, Chao Ye, Zhi Guo, Shuanglong Li, Lin Liu
